test.create_query: CREATE TABLE read_in_order_single_part (key String, payload UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY key AS SELECT concat('k/', toString(number % 100000), '/v'), number FROM numbers_mt(50000000)
test.query: SELECT * FROM read_in_order_single_part WHERE key LIKE '%/v' ORDER BY key FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM read_in_order_single_part WHERE key LIKE 'k/1%' ORDER BY key FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM read_in_order_single_part ORDER BY key FORMAT Null
SELECT key, sum(payload) FROM read_in_order_single_part GROUP BY key ORDER BY key FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 1
